homePage.heroTitle: Caring for your health with technology
homePage.heroSubtitle: We connect patients and doctors intelligently and securely
homePage.ctaTitle: We help you take care of your health
homePage.featureExamsDesc: Access and consult your exams quickly and in an organized way
homePage.featureRecordsDesc: Keep your complete and up-to-date medical history
homePage.featureChartsDesc: Visualize your health progress with detailed charts
homePage.featureWearablesDesc: Connect your devices and monitor your health in real time
homePage.cardTitle: Commitment and responsibility in managing your patient data
homePage.cardDesc: We believe that healthcare should be simple, effective and accessible. PulseFlow connects patients and doctors intelligently, promoting more proactive and collaborative care. All of this with total security and responsibility in the treatment of patient data.
homePage.howPatientDesc: Register important data such as blood pressure and glucose levels, essential for controlling conditions like hypertension and diabetes. In addition, track your diet and exercise, ensuring complete monitoring of your health.
homePage.howDoctorDesc: Use a specialized area to record exam data, search for patients and review health records on an ongoing basis. This allows for more detailed monitoring and treatment adjustments based on up-to-date information.
homePage.platformSubtitle: Our platform offers complete and detailed monitoring, specially developed for critical areas such as oncology and other medical specialties
homePage.oncologyDesc: In oncology, accurate monitoring is essential. PulseFlow offers point-to-point control of all aspects of treatment, allowing doctors and patients to record and monitor:
homePage.oncologyItem2: Records of pain or discomfort occurrences
homePage.oncologyItem3: Evolution of vital signs and clinical parameters
homePage.oncologyItem4: Monitoring of exams and laboratory results
homePage.oncologyItem6: Integration with wearables for continuous monitoring
homePage.featChartsDesc: Detailed visualization of the evolution of all health parameters over time
homePage.featRecordsDesc: Complete electronic medical record with detailed history of consultations and treatments
homePage.featGlucoseDesc: Recording and monitoring of glucose levels for diabetic patients
homePage.featBloodPressureDesc: Continuous blood pressure monitoring with alerts and trend charts
homePage.featCycleDesc: Complete menstrual cycle tracking with symptom and event recording
homePage.featGastritisDesc: Recording of gastric episodes, symptoms and occurrence history
homePage.featHeadacheDesc: Migraine and headache monitoring with frequency and intensity recording
homePage.featOccurrencesDesc: Complete documentation of pain, discomfort and relevant clinical events
homePage.featInsomniaDesc: Sleep pattern and rest quality monitoring
homePage.featWearablesDesc: Automatic sync with wearable devices for 24/7 monitoring
homePage.featAnalysisDesc: Comparative charts and trend analysis for medical decision making
homePage.featAlertsDesc: Alert system for abnormal values and medication reminders
homePage.benefit1Desc: Access to all health data in one place, facilitating medical monitoring
homePage.benefit2Desc: Quick identification of patterns and changes that may indicate need for treatment adjustment
homePage.benefit3Desc: Instant sharing of information between patient and medical team
homePage.benefit4Desc: Treatment tailored to the specific needs of each patient based on real data
homePage.footerTagline: Technology and care combined to deliver a complete digital health ecosystem.

selecao.title: Search Patient
selecao.heroDesc: Locate medical records securely using CPF or authorization code shared with the patient.
selecao.cardDesc: Enter the CPF to request access and use the authorization code received to open the medical record.
selecao.howTo1: Enter the patient's full CPF and click "Request access".
selecao.howTo2: The patient will receive a notification with a 6-digit code.
selecao.howTo3: Once the patient shares the code, enter it in the indicated field and confirm.
selecao.needHelp: I need help with this step
selecao.codeHint: After the patient confirms the request, enter the 6-digit code to open the medical record.
selecao.errCodeInvalid: Invalid access code. Enter the 6 digits.
selecao.msgCPFFound: CPF found! Enter the patient's access code.
selecao.swalLoginRequired: You must be logged in to access this page
selecao.swalLoadError: Could not load your information. Please log in again.
selecao.swalLogoutText: Are you sure you want to log out?

sobreNos.heroDesc: We are an innovative platform that connects patients and doctors intelligently, promoting more proactive and collaborative health monitoring with cutting-edge technology.
sobreNos.missionP1: To provide connected, efficient and accessible medical care for everyone, using technology to transform how healthcare professionals and patients interact.
sobreNos.missionP2: Founded with the purpose of democratizing access to quality healthcare, our platform facilitates the management of medical information and promotes continuous improvements in care.
sobreNos.value1Desc: We use cutting-edge technology to create innovative digital health solutions, always ahead of technological trends.
sobreNos.value2Desc: We guarantee the security and privacy of patient data, following the most rigorous compliance standards.
sobreNos.value3Desc: We make healthcare more accessible and convenient for everyone, without geographic or time barriers.
sobreNos.value4Desc: Committed to excellence in service and quality of care, always striving to exceed expectations.
sobreNos.commitmentP1: We believe that healthcare should be simple, effective and accessible. PulseFlow connects patients and doctors intelligently, promoting more proactive and collaborative monitoring.
sobreNos.commitmentP2: All of this with total security and responsibility in the treatment of patient data, respecting the privacy and medical confidentiality guidelines established by regulatory standards.
